name: JetBrains YouTrack REST API
what_it_does: JetBrains issue tracking and project management platform with REST API for managing issues, sprints, agile boards, time tracking, and custom workflows — with deep IDE integration and both cloud and self-hosted options.
use_cases: Creating and updating issues programmatically from CI/CD pipeline events
Querying sprint progress and velocity metrics for agile reporting agents
Managing agile boards and sprint backlogs via API for automation workflows
Tracking time spent on issues across projects for billing and reporting
Integrating YouTrack issues with JetBrains IDE automation workflows
not_for: Non-development project management without agile focus
Organizations not in JetBrains ecosystem (less benefit vs Jira or Linear)
Simple issue tracking without agile workflow needs
best_when: A development team using JetBrains IDEs needs tight IDE-integrated issue tracking with powerful agile board management and custom workflow automation.
avoid_when: You don't use JetBrains tools — the IDE integration advantage disappears and Linear or GitHub Issues are simpler.

auth.notes: Permanent tokens (API keys) for automation. Hub OAuth2 tokens for user-scoped access. Bearer token in Authorization header. Hub (JetBrains auth service) manages identity. Self-hosted uses same token model.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: up to 10 users (cloud); self-hosted free with InCloud subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Cloud from $4.40/user/month; Server perpetual license from $200 for 10 users
pricing.notes: Generous free tier for small teams. Perpetual server license available. Part of JetBrains All Products Pack. Competitive pricing vs Jira. Strong developer community.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per token; self-hosted limited by server

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API documentation comprehensive. Custom fields add complexity — query field schema before creating issues. Webhook delivery for issue changes, sprint events. Error responses include codes and descriptions.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Issue reads and queries are idempotent. Issue creation creates new issues each call — use external ID custom field for deduplication. Updates are idempotent with same data.
known_agent_gotchas: Custom field system is powerful but complex — must query project schema to understand field types
Query language (YouTrack Query Language) is proprietary — must learn for filtering
Self-hosted and cloud API endpoints differ in base URL structure
Agile board configuration affects what sprints/issues are visible via API

security_score_components.security_notes: SOC2, GDPR compliant. Bearer token auth. TLS enforced. Hub-based centralized auth for JetBrains ecosystem. Self-hosted for maximum data control. EU data residency option.
